news.title: Dell stock skyrockets 32%, heads for best day ever as AI server revenue soars
news.detail: Dell reported its fastest pace of revenue growth since returning to the public market in 2018, with AI server revenue soaring 757% over last year.

news.detail: 据知情人士透露，SpaceX当前对首次公开募股（IPO）的目标估值至少为1.8万亿美元。 媒体4月份报道，其目标估值逾2万亿美元。知情人士透露，这家火箭...

news.title: Dell shocks Wall Street with booming AI server sales. Where analysts see it headed next
news.detail: Dell reported blowout fiscal first quarter results on Thursday thanks to booming AI server demand, leading many analysts to raise their price targets.

news.title: 德意志银行上调10年期美国国债收益率预期 相信美联储已经完成降息
news.detail: 德意志银行利率策略师上调了今年年底的10年期美国国债收益率预期，理由是预计如今由主席凯文·沃什领导的美联储官员已经结束降息。

news.title: 欧元区四大经济体通胀超出舒适区 为欧洲央行加息提供数据支撑
news.detail: 欧元区四大经济体通胀率远超2%，为欧洲央行自2023年以来首次加息提供进一步理由。 周五数据显示，因战争推动能源成本飙升，法国5月份消费者价格指数同比上涨2.8%...

news.title: SpaceX skeptics have added reason for concern after Musk comments diverge from IPO filing
news.detail: In a post on X, Elon Musk offered details about SpaceX's deal with Anthropic that weren't included in the company's IPO prospectus.
